name: hospitality-hotel-operations
description: Hospitality / lodging hotel-operations team — 3 agents (hotel-operations-lead, revenue-manager, guest-experience-analyst) for running a property as a business: front-office / PMS operations, housekeeping, the guest journey, SOPs, labor scheduling, and maintenance/engineering coordination; revenue management and rate strategy (RevPAR / ADR / occupancy / GOPPAR, channel & OTA mix and cost, demand forecasting, overbooking & yield); and guest experience — reviews, online reputation, satisfaction measurement, loyalty, and service recovery with a comment-to-action loop. Decision-tree knowledge bank, 8 best-practices, 3 skills, 3 commands, 2 templates, 1 advisory hook, scenarios. Seams: restaurant / F&B outlet -> restaurant-operations; demand statistics -> applied-statistics; BI / reporting -> data-platform. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
